media:content.media:title: Crab Esquites, an Easy-Peasey Summer Dip ��
media:content.media:description: Would you like to try those?

item.title: The Perfect Summer Treat: Peach Shortcakes
item.description: These Peach Shortcakes are perfect for summer! Juicy ripe peaches are paired with buttery shortcakes and perfectly whipped cream. If you’ve never had a peach shortcake, you’re in for a treat.

media:content.media:title: The Perfect Summer Treat: Peach Shortcakes
media:content.media:description: These Peach Shortcakes are perfect for summer! Juicy ripe peaches are paired with buttery shortcakes and perfectly whipped cream. If you’ve never had a peach shortcake, you’re in for a treat.
